name: Canvas Desktop Organizer Light Brown - Brightroom™: Office Desk Tool Holder, Polyester, , 12.25"x5"x6"
description:
Make sure your desk looks nice and organized with the Canvas Desktop Organizer from Brightroom™. This light brown desktop organizer comes with multiple divided compartments to help keep your notepads, sticky notes and other essentials nicely contained. Made with canvas, this rectangle desktop organizer makes a practical addition to your work space or study area.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
